query:
UPDATE taskCompletion SET notionLastEdited = DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) WHERE organizationId = 240001 AND notionLastEdited IS NULL;
UPDATE validationResults SET notionLastEdited = DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) WHERE organizationId = 240001 AND notionLastEdited IS NULL;
